overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing high-speed driving through a futuristic neon-lit city at night during heavy rain. The vehicle navigates multi-lane highways, tunnels, and elevated interchanges with dense traffic and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit tunnel entrance with red ambient lighting

events.description: entering tunnel with intense red neon strips illuminating the walls and ceiling
exiting the red-lit tunnel section into covered roadway with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: accelerating through tunnel entrance with red neon lights reflecting on the wet asphalt surface

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: horizontal red neon strips lining the tunnel ceiling and walls creating ambient glow
smooth concrete walls with reflective wet surfaces on both sides of the roadway
illuminated advertisement screen visible at the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle approaching and entering a tunnel bathed in intense red neon light. The wet road surface reflects the red ambient lighting while the vehicle follows a red sports car through the enclosed concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway canyon between futuristic skyscrapers

events.description: exiting covered roadway into open highway with visible skyscrapers and neon signage
weaving between slower vehicles while maintaining high speed on wet roads

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on wet multi-lane highway between towering glass buildings

notable_agents.action: silver sedan changing lanes to the left ahead of the ego vehicle
black car maintaining speed in the left lane parallel to ego

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated windows rising beside the highway
elevated roadway crossing above the current highway level
bright pink and blue corporate signage on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a canyon of glass skyscrapers with heavy rain falling. The vehicle weaves through moderate traffic while neon signs illuminate the building facades, and an overpass looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested multi-lane highway with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: traffic density increases significantly with vehicles occupying all lanes
aggressive lane change to the right to avoid slower traffic ahead

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense traffic, changing lanes frequently to maintain high speed on the wet highway

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi directly ahead braking suddenly in heavy traffic
white sports car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: green directional signs suspended over the highway indicating exits
concrete overpass structure spanning the width of the highway
massive illuminated advertisement screen on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a wide multi-lane corridor with dense traffic filling all lanes. The vehicle aggressively weaves between cars while overhead signs and bridge structures pass by, with large digital billboards visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway section with wall-mounted advertisements and directional signage

events.description: entering covered highway section with reduced natural light and teal artificial lighting
transition to artificial tunnel lighting with distinct teal color cast on wet surfaces

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through covered highway section with directional signs visible overhead

notable_agents.action: black sedan maintaining distance ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: concrete ceiling structure enclosing the roadway with embedded lighting
overhead highway signs indicating directions to Watson and City Center
large illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway section sheltered from the rain, with teal artificial lighting replacing the neon glow. Overhead signs point toward Watson while wall-mounted digital displays line the concrete walls, and traffic thins to moderate density.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-elevation highway interchange with heavy rain and panoramic city views

events.description: ascending to high-elevation highway with panoramic views of the city skyline below
rain intensity increases significantly reducing visibility and creating heavy spray
navigating sharp curves and elevation changes on the elevated interchange ramps

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated interchanges with heavy rain and reduced visibility overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with red taillights visible on the lower ramp below

entered.detail: complex network of curved highway ramps at high elevation with red lane markings
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance through the rain
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment ascends to a high-elevation highway interchange with complex curved ramps overlooking the sprawling city skyline. Heavy rain reduces visibility while industrial smokestacks and distant fires punctuate the dark landscape below the elevated roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit tunnel into a sprawling, rain-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins with the vehicle entering a concrete corridor bathed in intense red neon light, following a red sports car across a wet, reflective road surface. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the environment opens into a canyon of glass skyscrapers where heavy rain falls and neon signs illuminate the building facades. The scene then expands into a wide multi-lane highway filled with dense traffic, with the camera weaving aggressively between cars beneath looming overpasses. Finally, the perspective pushes forward past overhead bridge structures and large digital billboards that line the right side of the corridor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, artificially lit highway corridor into a rain-drenched elevated interchange overlooking a sprawling metropolis. It begins as the vehicle enters a covered section where the neon glow of the city is replaced by teal artificial lighting and digital displays lining the concrete walls. As the road leads toward Watson and traffic thins, the camera transitions from the enclosure of the tunnel toward an ascent. The scene then opens onto a high-elevation interchange with complex curved ramps, where the shelter vanishes and heavy rain once again reduces visibility. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a dark landscape punctuated by industrial smokestacks and distant fires beneath the towering city skyline.
